content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 16, 2005

Helen Holmes Peak, City Attorney
City of San Marcos
1 Civic Center Drive
San Marcos, CA 92069-2918

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. W-05-008

Dear Ms. Peak:

This letter is in response to your request for informal assistance¹ regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").² This letter should not be construed as assistance on any conduct that may have already taken place. In addition, this letter is based on the facts presented. The Fair Political Practices Commission ("Commission") does not act as a finder of fact when it renders assistance. (In re Oglesby (1975) 1 FPPC Ops. 71; Govt. Code section 83114.)

QUESTION

May Councilmember Hal Martin vote on the appointment of an applicant to the city planning commission if the applicant is a campaign contributor to that council member, and if that applicant would otherwise be entitled to collect a meeting stipend as a planning commission member, but expressly waives and disclaims any right to collect such stipend?³

_______________

¹ Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice. (Section 83114, regulation 18329(c)(3), copy enclosed.)

² Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. All regulatory references are to Title 2 of the Code of Regulations unless otherwise indicated.

³ In your letter, the question you pose is based on a "source of income" economic interest in the applicant. However, in a subsequent telephone conversation you indicated that Councilmember Martin does not have a "source of income" economic interest in the applicant, as defined under the Political Reform Act, but that campaign contributions of $100 or more are defined as "income" under the local ordinance.

File No. W-05-008
Page No. 2

CONCLUSION

Under the facts presented, you have not identified any factors which would
indicate that the applicant is an economic interest of Councilmember Hal Martin's, as that
term is defined in the Act. Therefore, your request does not present a question under the
Act, or is purely hypothetical. Accordingly, the Commission declines to provide written
advice or informal assistance regarding your question.

Section 83114, subdivision (a) allows any person to seek advice from the
Commission with respect to the person's duties under this title.¹ Regulation 18329
states the Commission will assist persons in complying with the Act and will provide
formal written advice or informal assistance to facilitate compliance with the Act.
Regulation 18329, subdivisions (b)(8)(D) and (c)(4)(D and F) states that the Commission
may decline to give formal written advice or informal assistance, respectively,
when the request does not present a question under the Act or the question presented is
purely hypothetical.

The Act specifically provides that campaign contributions are not considered
income or gifts. (Sections 82030, subdivision (b)(1), section 82028, subdivision (b)(4).)
Under the facts you have presented, Councilmember Martin has no source of income
economic interest under the Act in the individual applicant for the planning commission
position. Accordingly, since you have not indicated an economic interest as defined
under the Act, your question does not present a question under the Act or the question
presented is purely hypothetical. Therefore, we decline to answer the specific question
posed in your letter.

For your information, we have enclosed the pamphlet "Can I Vote," a guide to
preventing conflicts of interest for public officials. If you have any other questions
regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William J. Lenkeit
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosures

I:\AdviceL trs W-05-008
